description:
A project finance analyst needs to understand how debt cost and leverage affect the Levelized Cost of Energy (LCOE) for a new 50 MW utility-scale solar project.

Write a PySAM script to perform a 2D sensitivity analysis linking a PVWatts performance model (Pvwattsv8) with a Single Owner financial model (Singleowner), using the 'PVWattsSingleOwner' configuration for both.

System Configuration:
- DC Capacity: 50,000 kW
- Array Type: Single-axis tracking
- Weather File: Use any available TMY weather file from SAM's bundled solar resource directory.

Financial Configuration:
- Total Installed Cost: $50,000,000
- Debt Option: Term debt as a percentage of capital cost
- Analysis Period: 25 years

Sensitivity Analysis:
Calculate the Real LCOE for every combination of the following parameters:
- Debt Percentage: 40%, 60%, 80%
- Interest Rate: 4.0%, 5.0%, 6.0%, 7.0%

Save the script to: /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/debt_sensitivity.py
Save the results as a JSON file to: /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/lcoe_sensitivity.json

The JSON output must follow this structure:
{
  "system_capacity_kw": 50000,
  "total_installed_cost": 50000000,
  "weather_file_used": "<name_of_file>",
  "sensitivity_results": {
    "debt_40_pct": {
      "int_4.0_pct": <lcoe_float>,
      "int_5.0_pct": <lcoe_float>,
      "int_6.0_pct": <lcoe_float>,
      "int_7.0_pct": <lcoe_float>
    },
    "debt_60_pct": {
      "int_4.0_pct": <float>,
      "int_5.0_pct": <float>,
      "int_6.0_pct": <float>,
      "int_7.0_pct": <float>
    },
    "debt_80_pct": {
      "int_4.0_pct": <float>,
      "int_5.0_pct": <float>,
      "int_6.0_pct": <float>,
      "int_7.0_pct": <float>
    }
  }
}
